evals.input: How do I structure the options for a Go cobra command so that both CLI flags and a config file work together?
expected_concepts: Options struct with json + mapstructure tags on every field
AddFlags method binding fields to pflag FlagSet
cobra.OnInitialize to defer viper config loading until after flag parsing
viper.Unmarshal(opts) in run() to merge config file + env vars into opts

evals.input: Why should I separate ServerOptions from a Config struct in a Go service?
expected_concepts: Options are CLI-facing and viper-unmarshaled — carry mapstructure tags and flag names
Config is the internal runtime struct passed to server constructors — no flag concerns
opts.Config() converts validated Options into Config
Prevents leaking CLI flag names into core application code

evals.input: How do I compose sub-options (like HTTPOptions, MySQLOptions) into a parent ServerOptions in Go?
expected_concepts: Embed *HTTPOptions as a pointer field with json + mapstructure tags
Parent AddFlags calls o.HTTPOptions.AddFlags(fs) to delegate flag registration
Parent Validate collects sub-option errors via errs = append(errs, o.HTTPOptions.Validate()...)
utilerrors.NewAggregate returns all validation errors at once

should_not_trigger.input: How do I structure my handler, biz, and store layers using Clean Architecture?
should_not_trigger.reason: golang-architecture handles layer design and Wire DI

should_not_trigger.input: How do I set up a Makefile for my Go project with version injection?
